stemHtml: Which statement concerning sweepback is correct?

options.a: Sweepback provides a positive contribution to static lateral stability.
options.b: A disadvantage of sweepback is that it decreases M<sub>CRIT</sub>.
options.c: Sweepback is mainly intended to increase static directional stability.
options.d: Sweepback increases speed stability at Mach numbers above M<sub>CRIT</sub>.
